Sweeny Does Not Want Americans.


\ secondary condition that makes
the mining camps in this great min
cral belt look like SO many crossroads
towns in Missouri farming district
is the permit system of employing
skilled and common labor.


To get work you must first apply
to the official employment agent. Ills
Interrogation points never follow a
question as to the applicants expert
ence as a miner. They are dotted in
among a series of interrogatories as
to your antecedents, the different
places YOU have formerly worked and
whether or not you ever belonged to
labor union. and the less you know
about the English language and the
rights of an American citizen the bet
ter chance YOU stand to get n job.
